sentences.translationEn: The students ate their lunch at school.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ فِي الطَّبَقِ خُبْزٌ وَجُبْنٌ وَبَيْضٌ مَسْلُوقٌ.
sentences.translation: Na tanjiru je bio hljeb, sir i kuhano jaje.
sentences.translationEn: On the plate there was bread, cheese, and a boiled egg.

sentences.translation: Pili su vodu i brzo jeli.
sentences.translationEn: They drank water and ate quickly.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ الْغَدَاءِ ذَهَبُوا لِيَلْعَبُوا فِي السَّاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon ručka otišli su igrati se na dvorištu.
sentences.translationEn: After lunch they went to play in the yard.
